actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour (guid f7de224e5fee443418417f9f2bfa2998) is the Scoremanager script attached to the 'ScoreManager' GameObject. In this Level4 scene instance (PrefabInstance overrides), fields are assigned as: ScoreText(fileID=109963300), AmountUI(fileID=109963301), Timer(fileID=109963298), StarValue=1, winAmount=6, winlosescript(component fileID=1943288799). To cover the branch in Scoremanager.changescore that calls winlosescript.Winlevel() when score == winAmount, we will directly invoke WinLose.Winlevel() on the referenced component because changescore(int) is not a parameterless callable event and no collider/EventTrigger is present on ScoreManager in the provided scene data.

Validate automatic behaviors of Scoremanager: Start() sets AmountUI.text to 'Star Amount: 6' (per PrefabInstance winAmount override), and Update() continuously updates Timer.text = Time.time.ToString('0.0'). This action passively waits to allow Update() to execute and Timer UI to change.
